message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to float_conv.zig

Migrate verbose builder pattern blocks to use emitConst helpers
for cleaner, more maintainable code generation:

- genFloat: Simplified all string parsing, type casting, and
  fallback paths to use emitConst instead of explicit builder blocks

This significantly reduces boilerplate while maintaining the same
functionality and preventing parenthesis/brace mismatches.
